account.title: Sync across devices
account.desc: Add your email to sync your progress, likes and highlights across devices. Your address is hashed in the browser — it never reaches the server.
tree.title: Skill map
home.progressNote: Lessons you mark as learned are saved here.
home.resumeKicker: Pick up where you left off
home.reviewNote: Quiz answers you missed come back here on a schedule.
review.title: Spaced review
review.lede: Questions you missed return here, spaced out so they stick.
review.none: No review items yet — take a few quizzes first.
hl.lede: Select any text while reading and choose a colour — it's saved here and marked on the page. Everything stays in this browser (and syncs across your devices if you add an email), so this becomes your own growing reference of what mattered most.
hl.noneBody: Open any lesson, select a sentence that caught your eye, and pick a colour. It will appear here, linked back to its place.
glossary.lede: Key terms across the Arabic language sciences, defined briefly.
comments.title: Comments
comments.hint: Sign in with Google to join the discussion.
comments.privacy: By posting, your name, picture and Google account ID are saved — not your email. You can delete your comment at any time.
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to join.
comments.notConfigured: Comments are not enabled yet — set PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.
footer.tagline: An interactive Arabic language reference · Built with Astro
home.feature.diagrams.title: Visual diagrams
home.feature.diagrams.body: Structured charts make relationships clear before you read a single line.
home.feature.examples.title: Applied examples
home.feature.examples.body: Every concept backed by authentic classical Arabic examples.
home.feature.memory.title: Made for retention
home.feature.memory.body: A quiz per lesson and progress tracking turns passive reading into a journey you complete.
home.feature.sources.title: Cited sources
home.feature.sources.body: Every rule linked to its sources in accredited nahw, balagha, and tajwid texts.
related.heading: Related lessons
quiz.title: Test your understanding
draft.title: 🚧 This page is being written
draft.body: The full explanation — analogy, diagrams, examples, trade-offs, and a quiz — is on the way. Here is the summary for now.
notice.title: Heads up —
notice.body: This reference is a work in progress and has not yet been reviewed by professional scholars. The content is AI-summarized from real, trusted source material. It's open source — help improve it, or tell us about anything that looks off.
